article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his release of a comprehensive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
He has released a sample pack in collaboration with Barnation, titled the 'Noizekid Sample Pack'. This collection includes all of his samples, loops, and drums used in various of his works.
Noizekid's work is situated within the moombahton and dancehall genres, and he is associated with a range of similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
While his individual tracks and releases are not indexed, his contributions to the scene are noted through his production work and sample pack release.
